Mission Control / Live workspace

Mission Control for creative work.

Projects, Studio Review, Files, Calendar, People, notifications and the AI Assistant now sit inside one connected Sorro OS workspace.

The mascot stays as the OS helper. It supports onboarding, empty states, AI prompts and workspace guidance without replacing the CSorro mark.

v2.5 Production readiness

Checked

Command palette, files, settings and polish are now connected.

This release turns the visual prototype into a more usable operating system foundation: faster navigation, shared theme controls, file surfaces, notifications, keyboard shortcuts and cleaner release structure before the next feature sprint.

✓Universal commandCtrl / Cmd + K now opens Sorro OS search and actions.
✓Theme engineNeo and Midnight modes persist locally across pages.
✓Core polishFiles, notifications, settings and quick actions share the same UI language.

Quick actions

Navigate Sorro like an OS.

Use keyboard shortcuts instead of hunting through pages.
